title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:
etic page is now available in Spanish: Variants and Health (variantes y la salud) 
Curious about gene mutations and how they impact health? Learn how different mutations affect health and development.
July 14, 2021
New Genetic Page
A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics: What are the different types of genetic tests 
Many types of genetic tests are available to analyze changes in genes, chromosomes, or proteins. A health care provider will consider several factors when selecting the appropriate test.
May 6, 2021
Genetic Page Available in Spanish
A MedlinePlus Genetic page is now available in Spanish: Cells and DNA
(CÃ©lulas y ADN) 
Discover the basics of cells, DNA, genes, chromosomes and how they work.
April 16, 2021
New Genetic Page
A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics:Â  What are mRNA vaccines and how do they work? 
Scientists have developed a new type of vaccine that uses a molecule called messenger RNA (or mRNA for short) rather than part of an actual bacteria or virus. mRNA vaccines work by introducing a piece of mRNA that corresponds to a viral protein. Using this mRNA blueprint, cells produce the viral protein, which triggers an immune response.
March 10, 2021
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Antibiotic Sensitivity Test Basic Metabolic Panel (BMP) Catecholamine Tests How to Cope with M
